title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: They have pickle flavored ranch. I would probably love this. The weirdest one is cheese it. Flavored ranch. It sounds kind of disgusting. I'm not going to lie.

title: will / shall
examples: Ooh, that sounds good. All right, I know where I'm heading. I'll put that on my list for next time.

But frozen pickle popsicles. I think I'll pass. I had a blast finding the most bizarre grocery items in Walmart today. I can't believe how many gems we came across. Let me know in the comments which one you would like to try one day. Thank you so much for watching my video. If you liked it, make sure to subscribe to my channel. Check out the pinned comment below. And if you want to take your English to the next level, make sure to check out my membership options. Thank you everybody.

title: When I do / When I've done
examples: They have party trays of fruit with a big caramel dip in the middle. This is maybe very American because we have the healthy fruit but then we like to dip it in caramel and make it a sugary dessert. I would devour this. I am truly American at heart. Wow. The sheer amount of different ice cream flavors they have is astounding. They have Kit Kat ice cream bars, Reese's ice cream bars, any flavor you could ever imagine is here. Eminem ice cream sandwiches and even gummy worm flavored ice cream. This is the first time I've ever seen this. It says it has a chewy gummy texture. I'm intrigued. I kind of want to buy this. They have cheesy bacon flavored ice cream for your dog. This is peak weird American grocery items. Something else that gives me reverse culture shock when I come back to the US is the portion size of different foods and grocery items here. Who needs this much chocolate ice cream? If you buy this I hope you have like seven kids off. I guess it's good for parties. Holy moly. I can barely pick it up. This thing is a weapon.

Mix the packet and you've got potatoes. Mashed potatoes. I think it's safe to say that most Americans are obsessed with cheese. So mac and cheese is a huge comfort food here. They have so many flavors but I was drawn to the flaming hot Cheetos mac and cheese. A lot of my American friends in Korea when they come back to visit America, they bring back flaming hot Cheetos with them because it's one of the foods they miss the most. Okay. I found another gem. They have Guinness beer flavored mac and cheese. I can't imagine the taste at all. I wonder if it actually has alcohol in it.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Today I am going shopping to find the most bizarre grocery items that you can only find in the USA.

So I came to Walmart which is one of the most popular department stores in the US. They have everything you could ever imagine and more. They have beauty items, electronics, home decor, but today I am only going to the grocery section because I want to find some weird foods only available in America. As you can see the weather is not the greatest right now so let's head inside.
Wow. I am in the produce section which is where they sell fruits and vegetables and I can't believe how cheap and affordable everything is especially compared to the grocery stores in Korea.

They have party trays of fruit with a big caramel dip in the middle. This is maybe very American because we have the healthy fruit but then we like to dip it in caramel and make it a sugary dessert. This is the first time I've ever seen this. It says it has a chewy gummy texture. I'm intrigued. I kind of want to buy this. They have cheesy bacon flavored ice cream for your dog. This is peak weird American grocery items. Something else that gives me reverse culture shock when I come back to the US is the portion size of different foods and grocery items here. Who needs this much chocolate ice cream? If you buy this I hope you have like seven kids off. I guess it's good for parties. Holy moly. I can barely pick it up. This thing is a weapon.
10 pounds of ground beef. If I need to work out I can just come to Walmart's meat section.

title: have to / must
examples: Whenever I'm feeling sick, I always want to eat soup because it clears up my sinuses. Well, I found the perfect soups for me. Pizza soup and cheeseburger soup. Tough choice. If I had to choose cheeseburger soup or pizza soup, oh gosh. I don't know why but I'd probably go for the pizza soup.

Probably like candied bacon. Yes. Which we tried the other day. No, we did not like. We did not like it. I think bacon should be salty. Yes. Yes. Not sweet. Wow. They have Korean yogurt drinks in Walmart. This is the first time ever I've seen it in a chain grocery stores before you had to go to Asian markets to find it. Now it's even available in Walmart. That's crazy. No way. What is this?
